column3: "Tea Tree boosts immune system" refers to its capacity to strengthen a person's body defense against diseases and illnesses.

"Tea Tree kills bacteria and viruses" refers to its ability to fight off harmful germs using its natural oils which is commonly found 
         in various products used for health and hygiene purposes.
"Tea Tree relieves pain and inflammation" refers to its ability to soothe and heal conditions that cause discomfort or swelling due to its natural properties.
"Tea Tree promotes digestive health" refers to its ability to assist the stomach, gut, and colon in working efficiently for better food absorption.
"Tea Tree reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and pain due to certain health issues.
"Tea Tree supports respiratory health" refers to its ability to assist with breathing problems due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
"Tea Tree promotes skin health" refers to its ability to provide effective care for skin ailments using natural ingredients found within it.
"Tea Tree aids in weight loss" refers to its involvement with boosting metabolism as you drink it.
"Tea Tree supports heart health" refers to its potential effect on cardiovascular well-being due to its antioxidant properties.
"Tea Tree anti-aging properties" refers to its ability to slow down or reverse signs of aging on skin.
